description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a sprawling, asymmetrical layout and a mix of single and double-story sections. The exterior features a combination of white and gray surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The house is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and a distinctive conical shrub. A long driveway leads to a garage or carport area, and the main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch. The windows are arranged in an irregular pattern, emphasizing the contemporary architectural style. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, with clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, asymmetrical layout, and landscaped surroundings. Features a long driveway, covered entry, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the house's L-shaped footprint, flat roofs, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main entry, driveway, and the two-story section with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the garage/carport area, backyard, and more of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, additional windows, and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and minimalist door design
